positive: A minimalist, high-contrast silhouette of a cosmic celestial body (planet, nebula, or moon) floating gently above a stylized mountain range. The main subject should be circular and luminous, rendered in deep indigo, electric sapphire blue, and streaks of cosmic gold. The background sky should utilize an ethereal gradient of deep teal to midnight violet. Style should be vector art meets detailed lithograph, ensuring crisp lines and defined edges. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for apparel printing. Use dramatic, directional studio lighting that highlights the curvature of the planet and provides strong separation from the background. The overall mood is mysterious, serene, and powerful. Print-ready, high detail, clean lines.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, jpeg artifacts, smudge, grainy
